title: diastrepho #1294
definition:
1) to distort, turn aside
    1a) to oppose, plot against the saving purposes and plans of God
 2) to turn aside from the right path, to pervert, corrupt
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to distort, turn aside
    1a) to oppose, plot against the saving purposes and plans of God
 2) to turn aside from the right path, to pervert, corrupt
